name: softui-css
description: A neumorphic CSS component library with soft shadows, muted palettes, and tactile depth.

scripts.build:min: cleancss -o dist/softui.min.css src/softui.css && terser src/softui.js -o dist/softui.min.js --compress --mangle && node -e "fs=require('fs');fs.copyFileSync('src/softui.css','dist/softui.css');fs.copyFileSync('src/softui.js','dist/softui.js')"

author: Siddharth Bhansali
